Premium U.S. clients seeking vetted developers. Flexible rates, full control.

Work with U.S. Clients

Virtual Launch Pro connects talented developers with high-quality U.S. clients seeking specialized expertise. Set your own rates, choose your projects, scale on your terms.

Get StartedHow It Works
Your Control
Set your own rates
Built for
Developers
What you get
Real opportunities

Why Developers Love Us

We handle the search so you can focus on what you do best: building amazing things.

Personalized Job Matches

Projects matched to your skills, experience, and hourly rate.

Direct Introductions

Warm introductions to pre-vetted U.S. clients ready to hire.

Profile Amplification

Your expertise showcased to top-tier client prospects.

Time-Saving Automation

Zero cold outreach. Clients come to you.

Real-Time Notifications

Instant alerts when new opportunities match your profile.

Finding Good Clients is Exhausting. We handle the search so you code.

Low-Quality Leads

Endless platforms with tire-kickers, scope creep, and clients who don't value your expertise.

Rate Pressure

Race-to-the-bottom bidding wars that undervalue your skills and time.

Communication Friction

Vague requirements, scope changes, and clients who don't understand development.

What We Look For

Professional standards. Real qualifications. Developers we're proud to recommend.

Proven Track Record

Portfolio, GitHub, or references showing real projects you have shipped.

Strong Communication

Professional English skills to work directly with U.S. clients.

Specialized Expertise

Deep focus in one or more technical domains.

Reliability & Availability

Consistent availability with a professional, accountable work ethic.

Simple, Transparent Pricing

Start free or go premium. Either way, you get matched with real clients.

Starter
Free

Get listed and receive occasional job matches.

  • Profile listing
  • Monthly job notifications
  • Basic support

Most Popular
Premium
$2.99/mo

Priority matching, more client intros, and faster response times.

  • Priority job matching
  • Weekly notifications
  • Featured profile placement
  • Dedicated support
